note: MASTER INDEX of every season Chains has data for. READ THIS FIRST. For each season, open its `file` to get the event list; each event_id maps to data/events/{event_id}-MPO.json (results + stats) and Firebase /rounds/{event_id}-r{N} (hole-by-hole, where archived). `stats` tells you how rich a season is so the UI can show the right panels: 'full' = advanced shot stats present; 'results' = finishes/scores/ratings/prize only; 'partial' = advanced stats on some events. Range is continuous 2016 -> current.

stats_legend.results: results, round scores, ratings, prize (no advanced shot stats)
stats_legend.partial: advanced stats on a subset of events

seasons.note: First DGPT season. Full results + scores; advanced shot stats on a few events only.
